commit_message:
Peripherals: add Port 62h live status mux and regression checks Peripherals: add Port 62h live status mux and regression checks Motivation:
KFPCJr has been essential for my MiSTer PCjr core effort:
https://misterfpga.org/viewtopic.php?t=10134

During compatibility testing, I found that Port 62h behavior needed refinement to better match expected PCjr live status semantics. This PR proposes that focused fix plus regression coverage.

Summary:
- Implement Port 62h bit4 mux using PB3 selecto
